purpose: Standard rejection and secondary-classification reasons for forward/new confidence-3 sample collection.

primary_rejection_reasons.description: direction_source is missing. Missing direction_source must not be interpreted as EXISTING_METADATA.
direction_confidence is missing.
direction_source is present but is not EXISTING_METADATA.
direction_confidence is present but lower than 3.
Direction was inferred or recovered rather than explicit existing metadata.
Direction is missing.
Direction is UNKNOWN rather than LONG or SHORT.
Direct decision_timestamp metadata is missing.
decision_timestamp is present but ambiguous.
Timestamp was reconstructed; reconstructed timestamps are not primary-eligible under this forward plan.
Stable ID cannot be resolved without risk of double-counting.
No sample_id or approved stable unique identifier is present.
Sample duplicates an existing analyzed or already collected sample.
Source artifact lineage is missing.
Source lineage is ambiguous enough that the row must fail closed.
Reference/entry metadata needed for later pre-entry H3/H4 computation is missing.
Manual evidence row remains RAPID_CAPTURE and has not been promoted to FULL_REVIEW with forward collection metadata.
Post-entry data was used to include the sample.
H3/H4 proxy state was used to include or balance the sample.
Outcome, GOOD/FAST group, or result label was used for inclusion.
TP/SL, PnL, R multiple, future MFE/MAE, or future liquidity behavior was used for inclusion.
Sample was selected because it looked good/bad or worked after the fact.
Eligibility schema version or commit is missing or does not match the batch rule.

secondary_only_reasons.description: May be logged as secondary/sensitivity only; cannot count as primary confidence-3 evidence.
Can be logged separately if useful, but this Adelin v2 confidence-3 target is XAUUSD primary evidence.
